title: phyllanthus myrtilloides subsp. alainii
intro: Phyllanthus myrtilloides subsp. alainii, also known as the Alain's Phyllanthus, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus myrtilloides subsp. alainii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to support liver health and reduce oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
